name: Mexican Orange-Almond Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour a round pan, 9x1 1/2 inches or an 8x8x2 inches square pan.
In a large bowl, beat all ingredients except almonds, 1 tablespoon sugar, and liqueur on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
Beat on high speed, scraping the bowl occasionally, for 3 minutes.
Pour into the prepared pan and sprinkle with almonds.
Bake until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean (about 40 minutes for round pan, 40-45 minutes for square pan).
Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar and drizzle with liqueur.
Cool for 10-15 minutes, then remove from the pan and cool completely before cutting.
